rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10) and rest on the same core reasoning: a strong senior IC who lacks the formal people-management, developer-tools/build-systems scale, and mobile-platform ecosystem experience the Level II Manager role requires. The differences are reworded phrasings and ordinary run-to-run variation (12+ vs 13+ years, slight reordering of concerns), none of which key off the Berlin→Bangalore location change. No score shift, no new location-tied concern, no age or origin reasoning appears.
